actionable_ideas: Provide technical analysis for stocks and trading to enhance user experience
Introduce a feature to tag mutual funds with specific investment goals or purposes
Improve the withdrawal process for mutual funds to reduce crediting time into bank accounts

verbatim_quotes.quote: Great App for Mutual Fund investment but not that great for Stocks and Trading as there are no technicals available.
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]

verbatim_quotes.quote: It's overall function is not good as others. withwral of some M.fund taking so much time to credit into the bank account.
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]
